Deploy SGSC-AI protocol to analyze the supply chain risk and uncover the true industry role of Changchi Machinery (Legacy).

**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Quanzhou Changchi Machinery Co., Ltd. represents a classic case of an 1980s township enterprise transitioning into a dormant asset shell. Officially misclassified as an 'Automobile Body and Trailer Manufacturer', its forensic history (extracted from 'industry_medium') shows it was founded in 1989 as 'Quanzhou Jiangnan Changchi Auto Parts Factory'. Its true business scope reveals a history of basic metal cutting, mining machinery, and general hardware processing. Critically, the inclusion of 'non-residential real estate leasing' combined with a corrected workforce of exactly 1 insured employee (2024) decisively concludes its operational status. This entity has ceased all physical metalworking and auto parts manufacturing. It now exists solely as a micro-shell in Licheng District, leveraging its legacy 1980s factory site for rental income.

**Risk Profile Summary:**
Trust Tier: **L1_REGISTERED** (Score: 79)
Operational Status: DORMANT FACTORY / REPURPOSED ASSET SHELL
